projects.title: A Slime
projects.summary: A local AI assistant with RAG (Chroma + LangChain), tool use, and a Vue 3 chat UI backed by FastAPI. Supports Google Gemini, Ollama, and NVIDIA NIM, with an optional Tauri desktop shell.

outcome.metric: Full-stack local AI agent with web and desktop clients
outcome.details: Document ingestion pipeline, WebSocket chat, calendar/search tools, and multi-provider LLM routing in a self-hosted stack.

projects.title: PHP Quiz Email Demo
projects.summary: A reusable PHP multi-step quiz template with client-side scoring and i18n (en / zh-Hant / ja). Submits responses to Google Forms and sends HTML result emails via Resend or Google Apps Script. Includes a GitHub Pages demo of the Goblin Identification Office personality quiz.

outcome.metric: End-to-end quiz flow from wizard UI to form capture and email delivery
outcome.details: Wizard UI with locale switching, Google Form POST integration, Resend/Apps Script email pipeline, and automated GitHub Pages deployment.

projects.title: Unity CI/CD Automation Pipeline
projects.summary: Developed a CI/CD automation pipeline for Unity builds using Fastlane, integrating Discord bot commands for remote control and TestFlight uploads.

outcome.details: Enabled remote-controlled builds directly from Discord, increasing iteration efficiency for QA and design teams.

projects.title: Unity Message Center
projects.summary: A type-safe messaging framework for Unity that decouples game systems through a centralized message-passing architecture. Distributed via Unity Package Manager, it bundles a message center (with and without data payloads), a flexible state machine, MonoBehaviour and plain-C# singleton patterns, coroutine scheduling utilities, and network message types.

outcome.metric: Reusable UPM package for decoupled Unity architecture
outcome.details: Type-safe pub/sub messaging, state machines, singletons, and coroutine utilities packaged for drop-in reuse across Unity projects via Git URL.

projects.title: Braverse (CookieRun IP – Outsourcing Project)
projects.summary: A web-based interactive tutorial teaching players how to play Braverse, a Trading Card Game (TCG) based on the CookieRun IP franchise.

outcome.details: Building tutorial systems and ensuring gameplay clarity for new players learning Braverse TCG mechanics.

projects.title: Wacky Boat
projects.summary: A fast-paced mobile action game currently under development, featuring a modular core gameplay system and an automated CI/CD pipeline that deploys iOS builds to TestFlight and the App Store, with native integrations bridged in Swift.

outcome.metric: Active development with automated iOS deployment pipeline
outcome.details: Core gameplay system enables fast team iteration; the Fastlane CI/CD pipeline streamlines iOS testing, TestFlight distribution, and App Store builds.

projects.title: Wacky Boat — Game Backend
projects.summary: A Go backend powering Wacky Boat — player accounts with OAuth sign-in, leaderboards and progress sync, and the game-services API the Unity client depends on. Containerized and deployed on Google Cloud Platform.
projects.context: Built the server-side foundation for a live mobile action game, supporting authenticated player accounts and persistent game data across releases.
projects.problem: The game needed secure player authentication, durable data storage, and a reliable API that the client could depend on as the game evolved.
projects.approach: Implemented a Go service exposing REST APIs for accounts, leaderboards, and game data; integrated Google OAuth / Identity for sign-in; persisted data in Firestore / Cloud SQL; containerized with Docker and deployed to Cloud Run / GKE on GCP.

outcome.details: Players sign in via OAuth, sync progress, and appear on leaderboards through a Go API deployed on GCP.

projects.title: Soul of Butterflies – Incubation
projects.summary: A narrative puzzle adventure independently developed, crowdfunded, exhibited at gaming events, and commercially released.

outcome.details: Exhibited at gaming events and received positive player feedback.

projects.title: Tarowl: Pocket Tarot
projects.summary: An AI-powered tarot reading app with a Flutter frontend, native iOS integrations in Swift, and a TypeScript backend on Google Cloud Platform — shipped to the App Store.

outcome.metric: Released to the App Store and iterated via user feedback
outcome.details: Maintained ongoing iOS releases, updates, and improvements.

projects.title: Emotional Management – Interactive Game
projects.summary: An emotional-learning educational game for the U.S. market, designed to support students' emotional regulation through interactive gameplay.

outcome.metric: Completed and launched with smooth delivery
outcome.details: Helped refine gameplay to fit educational use and emotional learning objectives.

experience.description: Leading game planning, Unity development, and project management for multiple commercial titles including Braverse (CookieRun IP with Devsisters) and Wacky Boat. Built core gameplay systems, CI/CD pipelines, and production infrastructure.
Developed and released the indie game 'Soul of Butterflies – Incubation' through crowdfunding and event exhibitions.
Organized and hosted events, including Google's Machine Learning Course, and managed cross-disciplinary collaborations among students.
